from.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money

ticket.subject: Re: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Re: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hi Team,

The customer sells perfumes and would like to display the SKU code on the Amazon Shipping label instead of the full product name. Since the product name is currently visible on the label, delivery personnel can easily identify the contents of the package. The customer has reported that package thefts have already occurred and believes the visibility of the product name is contributing to the issue.

To help prevent further incidents, **they would like the label to display only the SKU and quantity instead of the Product name or description.**

Please provide this option ASAP.

(Abhilash)

comments.body:
Hi Lakshya,

Please allow me some time to check this with our technical team.

In the meantime, could you please share an order ID that we can use to generate a test label and verify the behavior on our end?
If you'd like, we can also cancel the label after the test is completed.

Once I hear back from our technical team, I will provide you with an update.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

comments.body:
L3:
https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1780638676452699

SKU and Quantity Not Printing on Label

The customer reports that the SKU and Quantity are not being printed on the shipping label.
As per the discussion in Slack yesterday, the relevant toggle was enabled:
https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C091B699936/p1780567473956969

However, the customer generated a label today, and the Item Description field on the label appears blank, with neither the SKU nor Quantity being printed.

Could you please investigate why the label is not displaying the item details despite the setting being enabled and advise on the next steps?

Order : 2212
Product: GSB Top 5 Best Seller Perfume Sample Combo Pack of 5 | Inspired Luxury Fragrances | Long Lasting
[2 ml - each] SKU : Bestsellercombo

Store URL: 948165-59.myshopify.com
AC ID: 6bab6a3b-6770-4fbd-8d0f-35cb81352953

comments.body:
Hi Lakshya,

Thank you for your time on the call today.

As discussed, we have successfully exported and re-imported the products, and the SKU details have been updated in the product description section within the app. As a result, the shipping labels will now display the SKU and quantity information.

Thank you as well for confirming that the SKU and quantity are currently being printed on the labels. As discussed, this is currently being handled as a workaround. I would also like to update you that the enhancement to support this functionality natively is planned to be completed by 24th June, and we will keep you informed of the progress.

I am also happy to inform you that we have extended the 14-day free trial for your store.

You can now access the app and accept the subscription charges to continue using the app while availing of the extended trial period.
Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or require any further assistance.

Thank you for your patience and cooperation.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Lakshya,
 
Thank you for your time on the call today.
 
As discussed, we have successfully exported and re-imported the products, and the SKU details have been updated in the product description section within the app. As a result, the shipping labels will now display the SKU and quantity information.
 
Thank you as well for confirming that the SKU and quantity are currently being printed on the labels. As discussed, this is currently being handled as a workaround. I would also like to update you that the enhancement to support this functionality natively is planned to be completed by 24th June, and we will keep you informed of the progress.
 
I am also happy to inform you that we have extended the 14-day free trial for your store.
 
You can now access the app and accept the subscription charges to continue using the app while availing of the extended trial period.
Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or require any further assistance.
 
Thank you for your patience and cooperation.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Lakshya,

I would like to provide a quick update regarding the enhancement to support SKU and quantity printing on labels natively.
Our development team has reviewed the request, and the updated ETA for completion is on or before 7th July.

We appreciate your patience and understanding. In the meantime, the current workaround will continue to function as expected.

We will keep you informed of any further updates.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Lakshya,
 
I would like to provide a quick update regarding the enhancement to support SKU and quantity printing on labels natively.
Our development team has reviewed the request, and the updated ETA for completion is on or before 7th July.
 
We appreciate your patience and understanding. In the meantime, the current workaround will continue to function as expected.
 
We will keep you informed of any further updates.
